title.en: The Radio Contract: General PHY Requirements and PHY Services
title.zh: 无线电的契约：通用 PHY 要求与 PHY 服务

blocks.en: IEEE 802.15.4 defines many different radios — O-QPSK, BPSK, CSS, several flavors of UWB, FSK/OFDM for smart-utility networks (SUN), and more. Before the standard dives into any one of them, it writes a contract that EVERY one must honor. Clause 11 (General PHY requirements) states the shared duties of any physical layer (PHY), and Clause 12 (PHY services) defines how the MAC talks to that radio and which knobs it can read or set. Think of Clause 11 as 'what the radio must do' and Clause 12 as 'how the layer above asks it to do those things.'
blocks.zh: IEEE 802.15.4 定义了许多不同的无线电——O-QPSK、BPSK、CSS、若干种 UWB，以及面向智能公用网络（SUN）的 FSK/OFDM 等。在标准深入讲解其中任何一种之前，它先写下一份每一种都必须遵守的契约。第 11 章（通用 PHY 要求）规定了任何物理层（PHY）共同承担的职责；第 12 章（PHY 服务）则定义 MAC 如何与该无线电对话，以及它可以读取或设置哪些旋钮。可以把第 11 章理解为“无线电必须做什么”，把第 12 章理解为“上层如何请求它去做这些事”。

blocks.en: The general requirements (11.1.1) list the PHY's core jobs: turning the radio transceiver on and off, energy detection (ED) on the current channel, a link quality indicator (LQI) for received packets, clear channel assessment (CCA) for CSMA-CA, channel frequency selection, sending and receiving data, and — for ultra-wideband (UWB) radios — precision ranging. Unless a clause says otherwise, every PHY also appends a 2-octet frame check sequence (FCS). These duties are radio-agnostic: whether you are a Zigbee node on 2450 MHz or a Thread node, the same checklist applies.
blocks.zh: 通用要求（11.1.1）列出了 PHY 的核心职责：开启与关闭无线收发机、在当前信道上进行能量检测（ED）、为收到的数据包给出链路质量指示（LQI）、为 CSMA-CA 提供空闲信道评估（CCA）、信道频率选择、收发数据，以及——对于超宽带（UWB）无线电——精密测距。除非某一条款另有说明，每种 PHY 还会附加一个 2 字节的帧校验序列（FCS）。这些职责与具体无线电无关：无论你是 2450 MHz 上的 Zigbee 节点还是 Thread 节点，都遵循同一份清单。

blocks.en: Operating frequency range (11.1.2) and channel assignments (11.1.3) anchor the radio in the real world. A compliant device must operate in one of the listed bands — from 169 MHz up to 2450 MHz — and within a band, channels are picked from a numbering scheme. For example, the classic 868/915/2450 MHz scheme gives 1 channel at 868.3 MHz, 10 channels in the 915 MHz band, and 16 channels (numbers 11–26) in the 2450 MHz band. Every channel is described by a PHY-specific 'channel information structure' (11.1.3.1) capturing the PHY, band, operating mode, and channel number. Critically, a device must support all channels its region's regulations allow.
blocks.zh: 工作频率范围（11.1.2）与信道分配（11.1.3）把无线电锚定到现实世界。合规设备必须工作在所列频段之一——从 169 MHz 直至 2450 MHz——在某一频段内，信道按编号方案选取。例如经典的 868/915/2450 MHz 方案：在 868.3 MHz 提供 1 个信道，在 915 MHz 频段提供 10 个信道，在 2450 MHz 频段提供 16 个信道（编号 11–26）。每个信道由一个与 PHY 相关的“信道信息结构”（11.1.3.1）描述，其中包含 PHY、频段、工作模式与信道号。关键在于：设备必须支持其所在区域法规允许的全部信道。

blocks.en: The remaining 11.1 subclauses tighten the radio's behavior. Minimum LIFS/SIFS periods (11.1.4) set the spacing between frames — 40 symbols for a long interframe space, 12 for a short one on most PHYs (different for UWB, RCC, SUN OFDM). RF power measurement (11.1.5) says all power figures are taken at the antenna connector, or as EIRP for antenna-less devices. Transmit power (11.1.6) ties the radio's level to the PIB attributes phyMaxTxPower and phyTxPower. Out-of-band spurious emission (11.1.7) defers to local regulations. Receiver sensitivity (11.1.8) defines the lowest input power that still meets the packet-error-rate target. And the common signaling mode, CSM (11.1.9), gives SUN coordinators one shared mode so dissimilar SUN devices can find each other.
blocks.zh: 11.1 余下的子条款收紧了无线电的行为。最小 LIFS/SIFS 间隔（11.1.4）规定帧间间隔——多数 PHY 上长帧间隔为 40 个符号、短帧间隔为 12 个符号（UWB、RCC、SUN OFDM 不同）。射频功率测量（11.1.5）规定所有功率值在天线接口处测量，对无天线接口的设备则按 EIRP 计。发射功率（11.1.6）把无线电的功率电平与 PIB 属性 phyMaxTxPower 和 phyTxPower 绑定。带外杂散发射（11.1.7）服从当地法规。接收灵敏度（11.1.8）定义仍满足误包率目标的最低输入功率。而公共信令模式 CSM（11.1.9）为 SUN 协调器提供一个共享模式，使不同的 SUN 设备能够彼此发现。

blocks.en: General radio specifications (11.2) are the measurable parameters a conformance lab checks. 11.2.1 notes the meaning of a symbol period for SUN PHYs. TX-to-RX and RX-to-TX turnaround times (11.2.2, 11.2.3) must both be no greater than the constant aTurnaroundTime — how fast the radio can flip between talking and listening. Error-vector magnitude (EVM, 11.2.4) grades how cleanly the transmitter lands its constellation points. Receiver maximum input level (11.2.5) is the strongest signal the receiver can still decode. Receiver ED (11.2.6) estimates raw channel power (averaged over eight symbol periods) for channel selection; LQI (11.2.7) characterizes received-packet quality on a 0x00–0xff scale. CCA (11.2.8) lets a node decide if the medium is busy, with several modes: energy above threshold, carrier sense, combinations of the two, and ALOHA (always idle).
blocks.zh: 通用无线电规格（11.2）是一致性实验室要检验的可测量参数。11.2.1 说明 SUN PHY 中符号周期的含义。发射到接收、接收到发射的转换时间（11.2.2、11.2.3）都必须不超过常数 aTurnaroundTime——即无线电在“说”与“听”之间切换的速度。误差矢量幅度（EVM，11.2.4）评估发射机命中星座点的纯净度。接收机最大输入电平（11.2.5）是接收机仍能解码的最强信号。接收机 ED（11.2.6）估计原始信道功率（在 8 个符号周期上取平均）以用于信道选择；LQI（11.2.7）以 0x00–0xff 的尺度刻画收包质量。CCA（11.2.8）让节点判断介质是否繁忙，并提供多种模式：能量超过门限、载波侦听、二者的组合，以及 ALOHA（始终判为空闲）。

blocks.en: CCA modes are worth memorizing: Mode 1 = energy above threshold; Mode 2 = carrier sense (a matching 802.15.4 signal); Mode 3a = busy if EITHER fires; Mode 3b = busy only if BOTH fire; Mode 4 = ALOHA (always idle). UWB adds Modes 5 and 6, which sense the UWB preamble. The PIB attribute phyCcaMode selects which one is active. These modes enable cooperative medium sharing — they are not by themselves a guarantee of regulatory compliance.
blocks.zh: CCA 模式值得记住：模式 1 = 能量超过门限；模式 2 = 载波侦听（匹配的 802.15.4 信号）；模式 3a = 任一触发即判忙；模式 3b = 二者都触发才判忙；模式 4 = ALOHA（始终判空闲）。UWB 增加了模式 5 和模式 6，用于侦听 UWB 前导。PIB 属性 phyCcaMode 选择当前生效的模式。这些模式用于协作式介质共享——其本身并不构成对法规合规性的保证。

blocks.en: Some 802.15.4 radios do more than carry data — they measure distance. The ranging-capable PHY clause (11.3) applies only to ranging devices (RDEVs). 11.3.1 scopes it to devices that implement ranging support; 11.3.2 describes 'distance commitment on PSDU', a decoding method that captures energy only during short active RF windows within each PSDU symbol, hardening the timing measurement that underpins secure ranging.
blocks.zh: 有些 802.15.4 无线电不只是传送数据——它们还测量距离。具备测距能力的 PHY 条款（11.3）仅适用于测距设备（RDEV）。11.3.1 将其范围限定为实现了测距支持的设备；11.3.2 描述“PSDU 上的距离承诺”，这是一种解码方法，只在每个 PSDU 符号内的短促有效射频窗口中捕获能量，从而强化作为安全测距基础的时序测量。

blocks.en: Clause 12 turns to PHY services. The overview (12.1) gives the reference model: the PHY sits between the MAC and the physical radio channel, and it conceptually contains a management entity, the PLME, which maintains the PHY PIB (a database of managed objects). The PHY exposes two service access points (SAPs): the PD-SAP for the data service and the PLME-SAP for management. These SAPs are intentionally NOT spelled out as primitives because they are not expected to be exposed in a real product — instead the MAC reaches PIB attributes through MLME-GET and MLME-SET. PHY constants carry an 'a' prefix (e.g. aTurnaroundTime); attributes carry a 'phy' prefix (e.g. phyCurrentChannelInfo).
blocks.zh: 第 12 章转向 PHY 服务。概述（12.1）给出参考模型：PHY 位于 MAC 与物理无线信道之间，并在概念上包含一个管理实体——PLME，它维护 PHY PIB（受管对象的数据库）。PHY 暴露两个服务接入点（SAP）：用于数据服务的 PD-SAP 和用于管理的 PLME-SAP。这两个 SAP 有意没有以原语形式详细列出，因为它们预计不会在实际产品中暴露——MAC 改为通过 MLME-GET 与 MLME-SET 来访问 PIB 属性。PHY 常数带有“a”前缀（如 aTurnaroundTime）；属性带有“phy”前缀（如 phyCurrentChannelInfo）。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="20" y="10" width="420" height="34" rx="4"/><text x="230" y="32" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="14">MAC sublayer (MLME-GET / MLME-SET)</text><line x1="120" y1="44" x2="120" y2="70"/><text x="120" y="62" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">PD-SAP</text><line x1="340" y1="44" x2="340" y2="70"/><text x="340" y="62" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">PLME-SAP</text><rect x="20" y="70" width="420" height="80" rx="4"/><text x="230" y="90" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="14">PHY layer</text><rect x="250" y="104" width="80" height="34" rx="4"/><text x="290" y="125" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">PLME</text><rect x="345" y="104" width="80" height="34" rx="4"/><text x="385" y="125" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">PHY PIB</text><line x1="230" y1="150" x2="230" y2="176"/><text x="230" y="168" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">RF-SAP</text><rect x="20" y="176" width="420" height="24" rx="4"/><text x="230" y="192" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="12">RF firmware / RF hardware / radio channel</text></svg>

caption.en: The PHY reference model (Clause 12.1): the PHY sits below the MAC and above the RF hardware, exposing the PD-SAP (data) and PLME-SAP (management), with the PLME maintaining the PHY PIB.
caption.zh: PHY 参考模型（12.1 条）：PHY 位于 MAC 之下、射频硬件之上，对外暴露 PD-SAP（数据）与 PLME-SAP（管理），由 PLME 维护 PHY PIB。

blocks.en: PHY constants (12.2) are fixed, hardware-dependent values that cannot change during operation — the prime example is aTurnaroundTime (12 symbol periods for most PHYs). PHY PIB attributes (12.3) are the changeable settings. The overview (12.3.1) marks read-only attributes with a dagger; everything else the upper layer can both read and write. The generic attributes (12.3.2) are the ones you meet most often: phyCurrentChannelInfo (which channel to use), phyCcaMode and phyCcaEdThreshold (how to judge a busy medium), phyCcaDuration, phyMaxPacketSize, phyTxPower / phyMaxTxPower, phyRanging, and the ranging marker offsets. Beyond those, 12.3 carries PHY-specific attribute families so each radio can expose its own controls.
blocks.zh: PHY 常数（12.2）是固定的、与硬件相关的值，运行期间不可更改——典型例子是 aTurnaroundTime（多数 PHY 为 12 个符号周期）。PHY PIB 属性（12.3）是可更改的设置。概述（12.3.1）用匕首符号标记只读属性；其余属性上层既可读也可写。通用属性（12.3.2）是最常打交道的：phyCurrentChannelInfo（使用哪个信道）、phyCcaMode 与 phyCcaEdThreshold（如何判断介质繁忙）、phyCcaDuration、phyMaxPacketSize、phyTxPower / phyMaxTxPower、phyRanging，以及测距标记偏移。除此之外，12.3 还承载了与具体 PHY 相关的属性族，使每种无线电都能暴露自己的控制项。

summary.en: Coverage map — every unit in this lesson, with exact clause numbers
summary.zh: 覆盖地图——本课每个单元及其精确条款号

blocks.en: Clause 11 — General PHY requirements. 11.1 General: 11.1.1 Requirements and definitions (PHY duties, 2-octet FCS, the PHY list); 11.1.2 Operating frequency range (band designation table); 11.1.3 Channel assignments (11.1.3.1 channel information structure and per-band numbering); 11.1.4 Minimum LIFS and SIFS periods; 11.1.5 RF power measurement; 11.1.6 Transmit power; 11.1.7 Out-of-band spurious emission; 11.1.8 Receiver sensitivity definitions; 11.1.9 Common signaling mode (CSM) for SUN PHY. 11.2 General radio specifications: 11.2.1 General; 11.2.2 TX-to-RX turnaround time; 11.2.3 RX-to-TX turnaround time; 11.2.4 EVM definition; 11.2.5 Receiver maximum input level; 11.2.6 Receiver ED; 11.2.7 LQI; 11.2.8 CCA (Modes 1–6). 11.3 Ranging capable PHY: 11.3.1 General (RDEVs); 11.3.2 Distance commitment on PSDU. Clause 12 — PHY services: 12.1 Overview (PHY reference model, PD-SAP / PLME-SAP, PLME, PIB); 12.2 PHY constants (Table 12-1, aTurnaroundTime); 12.3 PHY PIB attributes — 12.3.1 Overview (read-only daggers); 12.3.2 Generic PHY PIB attributes; 12.3.3 Generic LECIM PHY related; 12.3.4 LECIM DSSS related; 12.3.5 LECIM FSK related; 12.3.6 LRP UWB related; 12.3.7 HRP UWB related; 12.3.8 TVWS related; 12.3.9 RS-GFSK related; 12.3.10 FSK related; 12.3.11 SUN FSK PHY related; 12.3.12 Other PHY related. Reference annexes: Annex A (informative) Bibliography — supporting references and IEEE 802.15 documents; Annex E (informative) PICS proforma — the conformance checklist a supplier fills in to declare which capabilities/options are implemented; Annex F (informative) Geographic regional frequency band details — which country/region each band designation maps to; Annex H (informative) Channel assignment for SUN FSK operating modes #9–#12 in the 920 MHz band — the SUN FSK channel layout that respects the ARIB band edges.
blocks.zh: 第 11 章——通用 PHY 要求。11.1 通用：11.1.1 要求与定义（PHY 职责、2 字节 FCS、PHY 列表）；11.1.2 工作频率范围（频段标识表）；11.1.3 信道分配（11.1.3.1 信道信息结构及各频段编号）；11.1.4 最小 LIFS 与 SIFS 间隔；11.1.5 射频功率测量；11.1.6 发射功率；11.1.7 带外杂散发射；11.1.8 接收灵敏度定义；11.1.9 SUN PHY 的公共信令模式（CSM）。11.2 通用无线电规格：11.2.1 通用；11.2.2 发射到接收转换时间；11.2.3 接收到发射转换时间；11.2.4 EVM 定义；11.2.5 接收机最大输入电平；11.2.6 接收机 ED；11.2.7 LQI；11.2.8 CCA（模式 1–6）。11.3 具备测距能力的 PHY：11.3.1 通用（RDEV）；11.3.2 PSDU 上的距离承诺。第 12 章——PHY 服务：12.1 概述（PHY 参考模型、PD-SAP / PLME-SAP、PLME、PIB）；12.2 PHY 常数（表 12-1，aTurnaroundTime）；12.3 PHY PIB 属性——12.3.1 概述（只读匕首标记）；12.3.2 通用 PHY PIB 属性；12.3.3 通用 LECIM PHY 相关；12.3.4 LECIM DSSS 相关；12.3.5 LECIM FSK 相关；12.3.6 LRP UWB 相关；12.3.7 HRP UWB 相关；12.3.8 TVWS 相关；12.3.9 RS-GFSK 相关；12.3.10 FSK 相关；12.3.11 SUN FSK PHY 相关；12.3.12 其他 PHY 相关。参考附录：附录 A（资料性）参考文献——支撑性引用与 IEEE 802.15 文档；附录 E（资料性）PICS 形式表——供应商填写以声明已实现哪些能力/选项的一致性检查表；附录 F（资料性）地理区域频段细节——各频段标识对应的国家/地区；附录 H（资料性）920 MHz 频段 SUN FSK 工作模式 #9–#12 的信道分配——尊重 ARIB 频段边界的 SUN FSK 信道布局。
